id.description: Stable unique id, for example fio-train-v1-001.

retrieved_snippets.description: Local retrieved evidence available to the assistant. Empty array is valid for refusal/abstention examples.

source.description: Local source reference, for example CRR.pdf p. 25.

text.description: Short retrieved excerpt used as evidence.

assistant_answer.description: Expected answer, refusal, or abstention. Must not include unsupported facts.

quality_notes.description: Short reviewer note explaining grounding, refusal reason, or source limitation.

example.user_query: Quali sono tutte le disclosure Pillar 3 di Intesa Sanpaolo nell'ultimo report?
example.assistant_answer: Non trovo nel corpus locale la disclosure banca-specifica necessaria. Senza quel documento indicizzato, non posso rispondere in modo affidabile sulla banca indicata.
example.quality_notes: The relevant bank-specific source is missing; abstention is required.
